title: Research Committee
desc: Conducts research to support evidence-based programs, policy recommendations, and organizational decision-making.

title: Projects Committee
desc: Plans, coordinates, and executes AYL's community outreach and leadership development projects from start to finish.

title: Communications
desc: Manages AYL's brand, social media presence, publications, and all internal and external communications strategies.

title: Membership Committee
desc: Recruits, onboards, and nurtures AYL members, ensuring an inclusive, engaged, and growing organizational community.

title: External Affairs
desc: Builds and maintains partnerships with other organizations, government bodies, and private sector stakeholders.

title: Finance Committee
desc: Supports the Treasurer in financial planning, fundraising initiatives, sponsorship acquisition, and budget monitoring.

title: Events Committee
desc: Conceptualizes and manages AYL's events calendar including assemblies, socials, leadership forums, and major productions.
